# HPD.ML.Backends.Pjrt

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-Backends

- [`BFloat16`](../types/hpd-ml-backends-pjrt-bfloat16.md) - Brain floating-point value with the standard 1-sign, 8-exponent, 7-mantissa bit layout. This is a hardware dtype for XLA tensors, not an exact algebraic scalar.
- [`PjrtApiVersion`](../types/hpd-ml-backends-pjrt-pjrtapiversion.md) - PJRT C API version reported by a loaded plugin.
